tests_point: multi-layer error propagation uses raise + suberror categories, not Result[T,E] threading (Rust/Go habit)
naive_failure: fn parse -> Result[Config, String] with match/unwrap at each layer, or one stringly-typed error losing the syntax/validation distinction
verify: conformance moon test (9 failure inputs must raise)
.mbti: load_config raises, no Result[, has public suberror
